description: Input C:N below which the C:N leaching attenuation A_CN is zero.
C:N span above the minimum needed to reach the A_CN cap for cropland and natural non-cropland.
Steeper C:N span for the Other land-use class (rocky outcrops, urban edges, riparian, abandoned).
Maximum C:N leaching attenuation (forest woody-litter anchor).
IPCC EF5: fraction of leached NO3-N emitted as indirect N2O-N.
Atlantic (wet) NH3-N to indirect N2O-N factor (IPCC 2019 Table 11.3).
IPCC 2019 Table 11.3 NH3-N volatilisation fraction for synthetic fertiliser.
IPCC 2019 Table 11.3 NH3-N volatilisation fraction for organic N inputs.
